name: Classic Pancakes
description: Fluffy buttermilk pancakes perfect for weekend breakfast
instructions: Mix dry ingredients in a large bowl
Whisk eggs, milk, and melted butter in another bowl
Combine wet and dry ingredients until just mixed
Pour 1/4 cup batter for each pancake
Cook until bubbles form, then flip
Cook until golden brown on both sides

name: Avocado Toast
description: Simple and nutritious breakfast with smashed avocado
instructions: Mash avocado with lemon juice, salt, and pepper
Add optional toppings like eggs or tomatoes

name: Scrambled Eggs
description: Creamy scrambled eggs cooked to perfection
instructions: Whisk eggs with milk, salt, and pepper
Heat butter in a non-stick pan over medium-low heat
Gently stir with a spatula as eggs cook
Remove from heat when slightly runny

name: French Toast
description: Golden French toast with cinnamon and vanilla
instructions: Whisk eggs, milk, cinnamon, and vanilla in a shallow bowl
Dip bread slices in egg mixture, coating both sides
Heat butter in a pan over medium heat
Cook bread until golden brown on both sides

name: Greek Yogurt Parfait
description: Layered parfait with yogurt, granola, and fresh berries
instructions: Layer yogurt in a glass or bowl

name: Classic BLT Sandwich
description: Crispy bacon, lettuce, and tomato on toasted bread
instructions: Layer with lettuce, tomato, and bacon
Top with second slice of toast and cut diagonally

name: Caesar Salad
description: Classic Caesar salad with homemade dressing
instructions: Squeeze fresh lemon juice over salad

name: Grilled Cheese Sandwich
description: Perfect grilled cheese with melted cheddar
instructions: Butter one side of each bread slice
Place cheese between bread slices, buttered sides out
Cook until golden brown on both sides and cheese melts
Cut in half and serve hot

name: Chicken Quesadilla
description: Cheesy quesadilla with seasoned chicken
instructions: Cook diced chicken with cumin and olive oil
Place cheese, chicken, and vegetables on half of tortilla
Cook in pan until cheese melts and tortilla is crispy

name: Tomato Basil Soup
description: Creamy tomato soup with fresh basil
instructions: Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil
Stir in cream and fresh basil

name: Spaghetti Carbonara
description: Classic Italian pasta with eggs, cheese, and pancetta
instructions: Cook spaghetti according to package directions
Whisk eggs and parmesan in a bowl
Drain pasta, reserving some pasta water
Remove from heat and stir in egg mixture
Add pasta water if needed for creaminess

name: Grilled Chicken Breast
description: Juicy grilled chicken with herbs and lemon
instructions: Marinate chicken with olive oil, lemon, garlic, and herbs
Season chicken with salt and pepper

name: Beef Tacos
description: Seasoned ground beef tacos with fresh toppings
instructions: Brown ground beef with diced onion
Top with lettuce, tomato, cheese, and sour cream

name: Baked Salmon
description: Oven-baked salmon with lemon and dill
instructions: Top with minced garlic, lemon slices, and dill

name: Vegetable Stir Fry
description: Quick and healthy vegetable stir fry with soy sauce
instructions: Cook rice according to package directions
Heat sesame oil in wok or large pan

name: Margherita Pizza
description: Classic pizza with tomato, mozzarella, and basil
instructions: Top with fresh basil and salt

name: Chicken Alfredo
description: Creamy fettuccine Alfredo with grilled chicken
instructions: Cook fettuccine according to package directions
Grill or pan-fry chicken, then slice

name: Hummus with Vegetables
description: Creamy hummus with fresh veggie sticks
instructions: Blend chickpeas, tahini, lemon juice, and garlic

name: Guacamole with Chips
description: Fresh guacamole with crispy tortilla chips
instructions: Add lime juice, diced tomato, and onion
Mix in chopped cilantro and jalapeño

name: Caprese Skewers
description: Cherry tomatoes, mozzarella, and basil on skewers
instructions: Thread tomato, basil leaf, and mozzarella on skewers
Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic glaze

name: Energy Balls
description: No-bake energy balls with oats and peanut butter
instructions: Mix all ingredients in a bowl

name: Bruschetta
description: Toasted bread with tomato, basil, and garlic
instructions: Dice tomatoes and mix with chopped basil
Add minced garlic, olive oil, and balsamic vinegar
Top toasted bread with tomato mixture

name: Omelette
description: Fluffy omelette with choice of fillings
instructions: Whisk eggs with milk, salt, and pepper
Add cheese and vegetables to one half

name: Smoothie Bowl
description: Thick smoothie bowl topped with fruits and granola
instructions: Blend banana, berries, yogurt, and almond milk until thick
Top with fresh fruit, granola, and honey

name: Breakfast Burrito
description: Hearty breakfast burrito with eggs and cheese
instructions: Fill with eggs, bacon, vegetables, and cheese
Roll burrito and serve with salsa and sour cream

name: Chicken Sandwich
description: Crispy chicken sandwich with lettuce and mayo
instructions: Layer with chicken, lettuce, tomato, and pickles

name: Tuna Salad
description: Classic tuna salad with celery and mayo
instructions: Drain tuna and place in bowl
Mix with mayo, diced celery, and onion

name: Vegetable Wrap
description: Fresh vegetable wrap with hummus

name: Minestrone Soup
description: Hearty Italian vegetable soup with pasta
instructions: Sauté onion, celery, and carrot in olive oil
Add pasta and cook until tender

name: Beef Stir Fry
description: Tender beef with vegetables in savory sauce
instructions: Slice beef thinly and marinate with soy sauce and cornstarch
Stir fry beef in hot oil until browned
Remove beef and stir fry vegetables
Return beef to pan with sauces

name: Pork Chops
description: Pan-seared pork chops with herbs
instructions: Season pork chops with salt and pepper
Heat olive oil in pan over medium-high heat
Sear pork chops for 4-5 minutes per side
Add butter, garlic, and herbs to pan
Baste pork chops with herb butter

name: Shrimp Scampi
description: Garlic butter shrimp over pasta
instructions: Melt butter in pan and sauté garlic
Add shrimp and cook until pink
Add white wine and lemon juice
Garnish with parsley and red pepper flakes

name: Chicken Parmesan
description: Breaded chicken with marinara and mozzarella
instructions: Dip in egg, then coat with breadcrumb-parmesan mixture
Pan fry in olive oil until golden

name: Lasagna
description: Classic layered lasagna with meat sauce
instructions: Brown beef with onion and garlic
Mix ricotta with egg and parmesan
Layer noodles, meat sauce, ricotta mixture, and mozzarella

name: Trail Mix
description: Healthy mix of nuts, seeds, and dried fruit
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a large bowl
Portion into small bags for snacking

name: Apple Slices with Peanut Butter
description: Crisp apple slices with creamy peanut butter
instructions: Serve with peanut butter for dipping

name: Cheese and Crackers
description: Assorted cheeses with crackers
instructions: Arrange on a platter with crackers

name: Deviled Eggs
description: Classic deviled eggs with creamy filling
instructions: Cut in half and remove yolks
Mash yolks with mayo, mustard, salt, and pepper
Pipe or spoon mixture into egg whites

name: Roasted Chickpeas
description: Crispy roasted chickpeas with spices
instructions: Toss with olive oil and spices
Roast at 400°F for 30-40 minutes until crispy

name: Chicken Noodle Soup
description: Comforting homemade chicken noodle soup
instructions: Cook chicken in broth until done, then shred
Bring to boil and add noodles
Add shredded chicken back to soup

name: Chicken Teriyaki
description: Sweet and savory teriyaki chicken over rice
instructions: Make teriyaki sauce with soy sauce, mirin, sugar, ginger, and garlic
Cook chicken in pan until browned
Add teriyaki sauce and simmer until thickened
Garnish with sesame seeds and green onion

name: Fish Tacos
description: Crispy fish tacos with cabbage slaw
instructions: Season and coat fish with flour and spices
Make slaw with cabbage, lime, and mayo

name: Meatloaf
description: Classic meatloaf with ketchup glaze
instructions: Mix beef, breadcrumbs, eggs, onion, and seasonings
Form into loaf shape in baking dish

name: Roasted Vegetables
description: Colorful medley of roasted vegetables
instructions: Chop vegetables into similar sized pieces
Toss with olive oil, garlic, and rosemary

name: Fried Rice
description: Quick fried rice with vegetables and egg
instructions: Add soy sauce and sesame oil
Mix in eggs and green onion

name: Stuffed Bell Peppers
description: Bell peppers stuffed with seasoned beef and rice
instructions: Cut tops off peppers and remove seeds
Brown beef with onion and garlic
Mix beef, rice, and tomato sauce

name: Pulled Pork Sandwich
description: Slow-cooked pulled pork on a bun
instructions: Slow cook with onion and garlic for 6-8 hours

name: Nachos
description: Loaded nachos with cheese and toppings
instructions: Brown ground beef with taco seasoning
Top with beef and shredded cheese
Add jalapeños, olives, and other toppings
Serve with sour cream, salsa, and guacamole

name: Chicken Wings
description: Crispy baked chicken wings with buffalo sauce
instructions: Season wings with salt, pepper, and garlic powder
Bake at 425°F for 40-45 minutes until crispy
Melt butter and mix with hot sauce
Serve with celery and ranch dressing
